name: Carousel Text
description: Multi-slide text for document/carousel posts. PDF carousels have the highest engagement rate (~6.1%) on LinkedIn.

variables.name: title
variables.description: Carousel title/hook — first 210 chars visible in feed before 'see more'. Use numbers.

variables.name: slide_1
variables.description: Content for slide 1 — one clear point

variables.name: cta
variables.description: Final slide — save/share CTA. E.g. 'Save this for later.'

tips: PDF carousels = highest engagement rate on LinkedIn (~6.1%)
Include CTA on the last slide
Saves are a strong ranking signal — educational content gets saved most
Optimal: 6-10 slides, one clear point per slide
